message:
feat(extensions): add NUMA-aware slab pool and replay trace recording to hostcall reactor

Enhance the HostcallReactorMesh with two capabilities:

1. NUMA slab pool integration:
   When core_ids are configured, the reactor now builds a NUMA-aware slab
   pool from the ReactorPlacementManifest, using a heuristic of 4 cores
   per NUMA node. This enables per-shard resource utilization tracking
   across NUMA boundaries. Thread affinity advisories are derived from
   the reactor's core mapping and exposed via numa_pool() and
   affinity_advice() accessors. Telemetry fields (numa_pool_active,
   affinity_advisory_count) are added to HostcallReactorTelemetry.

2. Replay trace recording in dispatch_host_call_shared:
   When the extension manager has replay enabled, each hostcall dispatch
   now records scheduling events, policy decisions, and execution traces
   through the ReplayRecorder. This enables deterministic replay and
   post-hoc analysis of hostcall traffic patterns.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
